questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Find the letter in place of question mark (?) in the series given below. A, E, I, M, Q, ?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What comes in place of question mark (?) in the series given below? B, C, E, H, L, ?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Replace the question mark (?) in the following series with appropriate letter. P, M, J, G, D, ?

solutions.solution: Every next term is obtained by adding 4 to the corresponding position of its previous term (letter). A(1) +4 = E(5), E(5) +4 = I(9), I(9) +4 = M(13), M(13) +4 = Q(17), Q(17) +4 = U(21). Required letter = U

Every next letter in the series is obtained by adding 1, 2, 3, 4 and 5 respectively to the corresponding position of its previous term (letter). B(2) +1 = C(3), C(3) +2 = E(5), E(5) +3 = H(8), H(8) +4 = L(12), L(12) +5 = Q(17). Required letter = Q

Every next term is obtained by subtracting 3 from the corresponding position of its previous term (letter). P(16) -3 = M(13), M(13) -3 = J(10), J(10) -3 = G(7), G(7) -3 = D(4), D(4) -3 = A(1). Required letter = A
